content: All Supabase reads go through TanStack Query hooks in src/hooks/. Default staleTime is 5min, gcTime 30min. The supabase client is a singleton in src/lib/supabase.ts. Never call supabase directly from components — always through a hook or lib function. Auth state is synced in App.tsx useEffect via supabase.auth.getSession() + onAuthStateChange.

title: Lazy user profile creation on first login
rationale: Avoids a separate signup flow or DB trigger. On first auth, App.tsx checks if a users row exists for the UID and creates it if not, using display_name from user_metadata. Simpler than a Postgres trigger and keeps profile creation logic visible in client code.
